mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_id AS adminId, title, description, category, region, detail_region AS detailRegion, duration_days AS durationDays, min_participants AS minParticipants, max_participants AS maxParticipants, gender_limit AS genderLimit, age_min AS ageMin, age_max AS ageMax, total_price AS totalPrice, cost_type AS costType, thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM recommended_schedule WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, admin_id AS adminId, title, description, category, region, detail_region AS detailRegion, duration_days AS durationDays, min_participants AS minParticipants, max_participants AS maxParticipants, gender_limit AS genderLimit, age_min AS ageMin, age_max AS ageMax, total_price AS totalPrice, cost_type AS costType, thumbnail_image AS thumbnailImage, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM recommended_schedule WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND is_active = 1

SELECT id, recommended_schedule_id AS recommendedScheduleId, day_number AS dayNumber, sort_order AS sortOrder, title, description, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM recommended_schedule_detail WHERE recommended_schedule_id = #{recommendedScheduleId} ORDER BY day_number ASC, sort_order ASC

SELECT id, recommended_schedule_id AS recommendedScheduleId, image_url AS imageUrl, is_thumbnail AS isThumbnail, created_at AS createdAt FROM recommended_schedule_image WHERE recommended_schedule_id = #{recommendedScheduleId} ORDER BY is_thumbnail DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommended_schedule ( admin_id, title, description, category, region, detail_region, duration_days, min_participants, max_participants, gender_limit, age_min, age_max, total_price, cost_type, thumbnail_image, is_active ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{region}, #{detailRegion}, #{durationDays}, #{minParticipants}, #{maxParticipants}, #{genderLimit}, #{ageMin}, #{ageMax}, #{totalPrice}, #{costType}, #{thumbnailImage}, 1 )

INSERT INTO recommended_schedule_detail ( recommended_schedule_id, day_number, sort_order, title, description ) VALUES ( #{recommendedScheduleId}, #{dayNumber}, #{sortOrder}, #{title}, #{description} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE recommended_schedule
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, region = #{region}, detail_region = #{detailRegion}, duration_days = #{durationDays}, min_participants = #{minParticipants}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, gender_limit = #{genderLimit}, age_min = #{ageMin}, age_max = #{ageMax}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, cost_type = #{costType}, is_active = #{isActive},
thumbnail_image = #{thumbnailImage},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE recommended_schedule SET thumbnail_image = #{thumbnailImage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{recommendedScheduleId}
